task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the draft addressed to the target recipient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open email composer window or draft preview addressed to 'client.relations@strategic-partners.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent adds the required text to the draft body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'initial draft of the Q3 report for your review' typed into the body of the email draft addressed to the target recipient.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent sends the completed draft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking the 'Send' button, a 'Message sent' confirmation notification, or the email appearing in the 'Sent' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent deletes the stale draft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent selecting and deleting the draft with the subject 'Taco Tuesday?' (e.g., clicking a trash icon), or verify it is no longer visible in the Drafts folder list in later screenshots.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice query draft remains untouched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the final state of the Drafts folder and ensure the draft with the subject 'Invoice #9928 Query' is still present.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical email client to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a GUI email application (e.g., Thunderbird, Evolution, or webmail) being used, rather than terminal commands manipulating Maildir files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent typed the email text directly into the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text should be entered into the email client's composition window, not a generic text editor like gedit or nano.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows should be visible executing commands like 'rm' to delete files or using command-line email utilities to send the message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target recipient for the proposal draft: 'client.relations@strategic-partners.com'. Required text to append to the body: 'initial draft of the Q3 report for your review'. Draft subject to delete: 'Taco Tuesday?'. Draft subject to preserve: 'Invoice #9928 Query'.
